import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";

const LOGO_SRC = "data:image/png;base64,";


// ─── CONSTANTS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const ADDR = "Arenja Arcade Premises, Office No. 112, Sector 17, 1st Floor, Above Dominoz Pizza, Vashi, Navi Mumbai - 400704";
const NAV = ["Home","Services","About","Careers","Contact"];
const IT = ["Python Developer","Java Developer",".NET Developer","C++ Developer","Full Stack Developer","Front-End Developer","Back-End Developer","Angular Developer","React.js Developer","Node.js Developer","PHP Developer","Android Developer","iOS Developer","Mobile App Developer","Software Engineer","Software Architect","UI/UX Designer","Graphic Designer","Web Designer","QA Engineer","Software Tester","Automation Tester","Manual Tester","DevOps Engineer","Cloud Engineer","AWS Engineer","Azure Engineer","Data Analyst","Data Scientist","AI/ML Engineer","Cyber Security Specialist","Network Engineer","Database Administrator","SQL Developer","SAP Consultant","ERP Specialist","Technical Support Engineer","IT Helpdesk Executive","Business Analyst","Scrum Master","Project Manager","Product Manager","Blockchain Developer","Embedded Systems Engineer","Game Developer","CRM Developer","Salesforce Developer","SharePoint Developer"];
const NONIT = ["HR Manager","HR Recruiter","HR Operations Executive","HR Generalist","Operations Manager","Assistant Manager","General Manager","Vice President (VP)","Business Development Executive","Customer Relationship Executive","Customer Support Executive","Receptionist","Accountant","Store Manager","Counter Sales Executive","Retail Sales Executive","Godown Manager","Warehouse Manager","Administrative Executive","Office Coordinator","Team Leader","Backend Executive","Telecaller","BPO Executive","Logistics Coordinator"];



// ─── SERVICE ICON COMPONENT (inline SVG - no dependencies) ──────────────────
function ServiceIcon({id, size=28, color="#0284C7"}){
  const s = {width:size, height:size, display:"block"};
  const p = {fill:"none", stroke:color, strokeWidth:"1.75", strokeLinecap:"round", strokeLinejoin:"round"};
  if(id==="IT") return (
    <svg style={s} viewBox="0 0 24 24" {...p}>
      <rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/>
      <path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4"/>
      <polyline points="7 8 10 11 7 14"/>
      <line x1="13" y1="14" x2="17" y2="14"/>
    </svg>
  );
  if(id==="NonIT") return (
    <svg style={s} viewBox="0 0 24 24" {...p}>
      <path d="M17 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H5a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/>
      <circle cx="9" cy="7" r="4"/>
      <path d="M23 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-3-3.87"/>
      <path d="M16 3.13a4 4 0 0 1 0 7.75"/>
    </svg>
  );
  if(id==="Payroll") return (
    <svg style={s} viewBox="0 0 24 24" {...p}>
      <rect x="1" y="4" width="22" height="16" rx="2"/>
      <line x1="1" y1="10" x2="23" y2="10"/>
      <line x1="7" y1="15" x2="9" y2="15"/>
      <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="17" y2="15"/>
    </svg>
  );
  if(id==="Software") return (
    <svg style={s} viewBox="0 0 24 24" {...p}>
      <polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/>
      <polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/>
    </svg>
  );
  if(id==="BPO") return (
    <svg style={s} viewBox="0 0 24 24" {...p}>
      <path d="M3 18v-6a9 9 0 0 1 18 0v6"/>
      <path d="M21 19a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-1a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-3a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h3z"/>
      <path d="M3 19a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h1a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-3a2 2 0 0 0-2-2H3z"/>
    </svg>
  );
  return null;
}

const SVCS = [
  {ic:"IT",t:"IT Recruitment",tag:"IT",d:"End-to-end hiring for 50+ IT roles — developers, architects, AI/ML, DevOps, cloud and cybersecurity across PAN India.",pts:["Python, Java, React, Angular, Node.js","AI/ML, DevOps, Cloud Engineers","Cybersecurity, Data Science, Blockchain","QA, SAP, ERP, Salesforce Specialists"]},
  {ic:"NonIT",t:"Non-IT Recruitment",tag:"Non-IT",d:"Cross-industry Non-IT hiring from entry-level to senior leadership — BFSI, FMCG, Manufacturing, BPO.",pts:["Finance, Sales & Business Development","HR, Operations & Administration","BPO & Customer Support Roles","Logistics, Retail & Manufacturing"]},
  {ic:"Payroll",t:"Payroll Management",tag:"Payroll",d:"Complete HR & Payroll — salary processing, statutory compliance, PF/ESIC and professional tax.",pts:["Salary Structuring & Processing","PF, ESIC & Professional Tax","Labour Law & Statutory Compliance","Full & Final Settlements"]},
  {ic:"Software",t:"Software Development",tag:"Software",d:"Custom software — CRM, ERP, mobile apps, web platforms and AI integrations.",pts:["Custom CRM & ERP Solutions","Mobile Apps (iOS & Android)","Web Applications & Portals","AI Integration & Automation Tools"]},
  {ic:"BPO",t:"BPO & Outsourcing",tag:"BPO",d:"500+ BPO workforce experience. International & domestic voice, customer service, lead generation.",pts:["International Voice Process","Customer Service Operations","Lead Generation Campaigns","Email, Chat & Backend Support"]},
];
const JOBS = [
  {id:1,title:"Senior AI/ML Engineer",loc:"Navi Mumbai / Remote",exp:"4-8 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:true},
  {id:2,title:"Full Stack Developer (React + Node)",loc:"Mumbai / Hybrid",exp:"2-5 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:false},
  {id:3,title:"DevOps / Cloud Architect",loc:"Remote",exp:"5-9 yrs",type:"Contract",dept:"IT",hot:true},
  {id:4,title:"Cybersecurity Engineer",loc:"Mumbai",exp:"3-7 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:false},
  {id:5,title:"React.js / Angular Developer",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"2-4 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:true},
  {id:6,title:"Data Scientist / Data Analyst",loc:"Mumbai / Remote",exp:"3-6 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:false},
  {id:7,title:"HR Manager",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"5-8 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:8,title:"Operations Manager",loc:"Mumbai",exp:"6-10 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:9,title:"Business Development Executive",loc:"Pan India",exp:"2-5 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:true},
  {id:10,title:"BPO Team Leader",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"3-5 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:11,title:"Senior Finance Manager",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"7-12 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:12,title:"Accountant",loc:"Mumbai",exp:"2-4 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
];
const TESTI = [
  {name:"Rajiv Mehta",role:"CTO, FinTech Startup",txt:"A-CONNEXION delivered 3 senior developers in under 10 days. Pre-screened candidates saved us weeks of effort. Truly exceptional!"},
  {name:"Anita Sharma",role:"HR Head, Manufacturing Co.",txt:"Outstanding Non-IT recruitment for our operations team. Quality candidates and excellent communication throughout."},
  {name:"David Chen",role:"VP Engineering, SaaS Platform",txt:"Our go-to recruitment partner for 2+ years. They understand technical hiring deeply. Highly recommended!"},
];
const WA = "https://wa.me/919869043500";
const WA_PATH = "M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z";

// ─── GLOBAL CSS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const G = `
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap');
@keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@keyframes bn{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-4px);}}
@keyframes sd{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-8px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;background:#F0F9FF;color:#0F172A;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#E0F2FE;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:linear-gradient(#38BDF8,#0EA5E9);border-radius:4px;}
.fu{animation:fu 0.5s ease both;}
.sd{animation:sd 0.25s ease both;}

/* Buttons */
.bp{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7);color:#fff;border:none;padding:12px 26px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(56,189,248,0.4);transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;}
.bp:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(56,189,248,0.5);}
.bw{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#fff;color:#0284C7;border:none;padding:12px 26px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;}
.bw:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}
.bg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);padding:11px 24px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;}
.bg:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.28);}
.bwa{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#25D366;color:#fff;border:none;padding:10px 20px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;white-space:nowrap;}
.bwa:hover{background:#1DAA54;transform:translateY(-2px);}

/* Cards */
.card{background:#fff;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid #E0F2FE;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(14,165,233,0.06);transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;overflow:hidden;}
.card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 14px 42px rgba(14,165,233,0.14);}

/* Inputs */
.inp{width:100%;background:#F8FAFF;border:1.5px solid #BAE6FD;color:#0F172A;padding:12px 15px;border-radius:11px;font-size:14px;transition:all 0.18s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;outline:none;}
.inp:focus{border-color:#38BDF8;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(56,189,248,0.1);}
.inp::placeholder{color:#94A3B8;}

/* Job row */
.jrow{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:18px 22px;border:1px solid #E0F2FE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;transition:all 0.2s;}
.jrow:hover{border-color:#38BDF8;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.12);}

/* Pills */
.pill{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:50px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;}
.rpill{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:50px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:inline-block;transition:all 0.18s;}
.rpill:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(14,165,233,0.18);}

/* Nav */
.nl{background:transparent;color:#fff;border:none;border-bottom:3px solid transparent;padding:13px 20px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;transition:all 0.18s;opacity:0.82;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.nl:hover,.nl.act{opacity:1;border-bottom-color:#fff;font-weight:700;}
.lbl{display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EFF9FF,#DBEAFE);color:#0EA5E9;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 15px;border-radius:50px;border:1px solid #BAE6FD;margin-bottom:12px;}

/* ── HAMBURGER (hidden desktop) ── */
.ham{display:none;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:5px;width:44px;height:44px;background:none;border:2px solid #E0F2FE;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;padding:0;flex-shrink:0;}
.ham span{display:block;width:20px;height:2.5px;background:#334155;border-radius:2px;transition:all 0.3s;}
.ham.open{border-color:#0284C7;background:#EFF9FF;}
.ham.open span:nth-child(1){transform:rotate(45deg) translate(5px,5px);background:#0284C7;}
.ham.open span:nth-child(2){opacity:0;transform:scaleX(0);}
.ham.open span:nth-child(3){transform:rotate(-45deg) translate(5px,-5px);background:#0284C7;}

/* Mobile menu */
.mob-menu{display:none;}

/* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
@media(max-width:768px){
  .ham{display:flex !important;}
  .desk-nav{display:none !important;}
  .nav-ph{display:none !important;}
  .mob-menu.open{display:block !important;animation:sd 0.25s ease;}
}
@media(max-width:520px){
  .nav-wa{display:none !important;}
  .bp{padding:9px 18px;font-size:13px;}
  .bw{padding:9px 18px;font-size:13px;}
  .bwa{padding:8px 16px;font-size:13px;}
}
@media(max-width:400px){
  .bp,.bw,.bg,.bwa{font-size:12px;padding:8px 14px;}
}
`;

function injectG(){
  if(document.getElementById("acg"))return;
  const s=document.createElement("style");
  s.id="acg";s.textContent=G;
  document.head.appendChild(s);
}

// ─── LOGO IMG ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Logo({w=72}){
  return <img src={LOGO_SRC} alt="A-CONNEXION" style={{width:w,height:"auto",objectFit:"contain",display:"block",maxHeight:72}}/>;

}

// ─── MAIN APP ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export default function App(){
  const [pg,setPg]   = useState("Home");
  const [jf,setJf]   = useState("All");
  const [pt,setPt]   = useState("IT");
  const [aj,setAj]   = useState(null);
  const [done,setDone] = useState(false);
  const [mm,setMm]   = useState(false);
  const [sc,setSc]   = useState(false);
  const [ti,setTi]   = useState(0);
  const [co,setCo]   = useState(false);
  const [msgs,setMsgs] = useState([{from:"bot",text:"Hello! 👋 Welcome to A-CONNEXION Tech International!\n\nEst. 2005 · 20+ Years · 3,000+ Placements\n\nHow can I help you today?",quick:["Browse Jobs","IT Recruitment","Our Address","Contact Us"]}]);
  const [ci,setCi]   = useState("");
  const [tp,setTp]   = useState(false);
  const [fm,setFm]   = useState({name:"",email:"",phone:"",exp:"",cover:"",file:null});
  const [cf,setCf]   = useState({name:"",email:"",phone:"",sub:"Hiring Enquiry",msg:""});
  const [cs,setCs]   = useState(false);
  const ceRef = useRef(null);
  const frRef = useRef(null);

  useEffect(()=>{injectG();},[]);
  useEffect(()=>{const t=setInterval(()=>setTi(i=>(i+1)%TESTI.length),4500);return()=>clearInterval(t);},[]);
  useEffect(()=>{ceRef.current?.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth"});},[msgs,tp]);
  useEffect(()=>{const fn=()=>setSc(window.scrollY>10);window.addEventListener("scroll",fn);return()=>window.removeEventListener("scroll",fn);},[]);

  const go=p=>{setPg(p);setAj(null);setDone(false);setMm(false);window.scrollTo(0,0);};
  const applyFor=(title,dept)=>{setAj({title,loc:"Navi Mumbai / PAN India",exp:"Relevant",type:"Full-Time",dept});setPg("Careers");setDone(false);setFm({name:"",email:"",phone:"",exp:"",cover:"",file:null});window.scrollTo(0,0);};

  const chat=txt=>{
    const q=txt||ci.trim();if(!q)return;
    setMsgs(m=>[...m,{from:"user",text:q}]);setCi("");setTp(true);
    const ql=q.toLowerCase();
    let r="Thank you! Call +91 9869043500 or email info@aconnexion.in 😊";
    if(ql.includes("address")||ql.includes("location")||ql.includes("office"))r="📍 Our Office:\n\n"+ADDR+"\n\n📞 +91 9869043500\n📧 info@aconnexion.in";
    else if(ql.includes("job")||ql.includes("career")||ql.includes("opening"))r="We have 12+ live openings!\n\n→ Click Careers in the menu\n→ Filter by IT or Non-IT\n→ Click Apply Now\n\nOr WhatsApp CV: +91 9869043500";
    else if(ql.includes("it")||ql.includes("developer")||ql.includes("engineer"))r="We recruit 50+ IT roles:\n• Full Stack, React, Angular\n• AI/ML, DevOps, Cloud\n• Cybersecurity, Data Science\n• Blockchain, SAP, ERP\n\nVisit Careers to apply!";
    else if(ql.includes("payroll")||ql.includes("salary")||ql.includes("pf"))r="Our Payroll Services:\n✓ Salary Processing\n✓ PF & ESIC Management\n✓ Professional Tax\n✓ Labour Law Compliance";
    else if(ql.includes("contact")||ql.includes("phone")||ql.includes("email"))r="📞 +91 9869043500\n📞 +91 8897123500\n📧 info@aconnexion.in\n\n📍 "+ADDR;
    else if(ql.includes("hello")||ql.includes("hi"))r="Hello! 👋 I can help with:\n• IT & Non-IT Recruitment\n• Software Development\n• Payroll Management\n• BPO Services\n\nWhat do you need?";
    setTimeout(()=>{setTp(false);setMsgs(m=>[...m,{from:"bot",text:r}]);},750);
  };

  // ── NAVBAR ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const Navbar=()=>(
    <header style={{position:"fixed",top:0,left:0,right:0,zIndex:1000,boxShadow:sc?"0 4px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.15)":"none",transition:"box-shadow 0.3s"}}>

      {/* Top bar */}
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #E0F2FE"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",padding:"0 clamp(14px,3vw,36px)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",height:"clamp(82px,9vw,100px)"}}>

          {/* Logo + Name */}
          <div onClick={()=>go("Home")} style={{cursor:"pointer",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:14,flexShrink:0}}>
            <Logo w={95} />
            <div style={{borderLeft:"3px solid #E2E8F0",paddingLeft:14}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:900,fontSize:"clamp(17px,2.2vw,23px)",color:"#CC0000",letterSpacing:1,lineHeight:1.15,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>A-CONNEXION</div>
              <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:"clamp(8px,0.9vw,11px)",color:"#475569",letterSpacing:"clamp(1.5px,0.4vw,3px)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginTop:4,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>TECH INTERNATIONAL</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Right actions */}
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
            <a href="tel:+919869043500" className="nav-ph" style={{textDecoration:"none",color:"#334155",fontWeight:600,fontSize:13,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:5,whiteSpace:"nowrap"}}>
              📞 +91 9869043500
            </a>
            <a href={WA} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" className="nav-wa">
              <button className="bwa" style={{padding:"8px 16px",fontSize:13}}>💬 WhatsApp</button>
            </a>
            {/* Hamburger */}
            <button className={"ham"+(mm?" open":"")} onClick={()=>setMm(o=>!o)} aria-label="Menu">
              <span/><span/><span/>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Desktop nav bar */}
      <div className="desk-nav" style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#0369A1)",boxShadow:"0 2px 10px rgba(2,132,199,0.3)"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",padding:"0 clamp(10px,3vw,36px)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center"}}>
          {NAV.map(n=>(
            <button key={n} className={"nl"+(pg===n?" act":"")} onClick={()=>go(n)}>{n}</button>
          ))}
          <div style={{flex:1}}/>
          <button onClick={()=>go("Contact")} style={{background:"#fff",color:"#0284C7",border:"none",borderRadius:6,padding:"9px 20px",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>🚀 Hire Talent</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Mobile dropdown */}
      <div className={"mob-menu"+(mm?" open":"")}>
        <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"3px solid #0284C7",boxShadow:"0 10px 32px rgba(14,165,233,0.15)"}}>
          {NAV.map(n=>(
            <button key={n} onClick={()=>go(n)} style={{display:"block",width:"100%",textAlign:"left",padding:"14px 24px",background:pg===n?"#EFF9FF":"transparent",border:"none",borderLeft:"4px solid "+(pg===n?"#0284C7":"transparent"),color:pg===n?"#0284C7":"#334155",fontWeight:pg===n?700:500,fontSize:15,cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif",transition:"all 0.15s"}}>
              {n}
            </button>
          ))}
          <div style={{padding:"12px 20px 16px",borderTop:"1px solid #E0F2FE",display:"flex",gap:10,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
            <a href="tel:+919869043500" style={{textDecoration:"none"}}><button className="bp" style={{fontSize:13,padding:"10px 20px"}}>📞 Call Now</button></a>
            <button className="bwa" onClick={()=>go("Contact")} style={{fontSize:13,padding:"10px 20px"}}>🚀 Hire Talent</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>
  );

  // ── PAGE HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const PH=({label,title,sub})=>(
    <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",padding:"clamp(30px,5vw,60px) clamp(16px,4vw,40px) clamp(24px,4vw,44px)"}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <span className="lbl" style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.13)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.9)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"}}>{label}</span>
        <h1 style={{fontSize:"clamp(26px,4vw,50px)",fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.08,marginTop:8,marginBottom:10}}>{title}</h1>

          <div style={{padding:"9px 11px",borderTop:"1px solid #E0F2FE",display:"flex",gap:7,background:"#fff"}}>
            <input value={ci} onChange={e=>setCi(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&chat()} placeholder="Type your message..." style={{flex:1,background:"#F8FAFF",border:"1.5px solid #BAE6FD",color:"#0F172A",padding:"9px 13px",borderRadius:50,fontSize:12.5,outline:"none",fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}/>
            <button onClick={()=>chat()} style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:"50%",width:38,height:38,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:15,flexShrink:0}}>→</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <button onClick={()=>setCo(o=>!o)} style={{width:54,height:54,borderRadius:"50%",background:co?"#fff":"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",border:co?"2px solid #38BDF8":"none",color:co?"#0284C7":"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:22,boxShadow:"0 5px 20px rgba(56,189,248,0.45)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",transition:"all 0.25s"}}>
        {co?"✕":"💬"}
      </button>
    </div>
  );

  // ── RENDER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const pages={Home,Services,About,Careers,Contact};
  const Page=pages[pg]||Home;
  return(
    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:"#F0F9FF"}}>
      {Navbar()}
      {Page()}
      {Footer()}
      {Chatbot()}
    </div>
  );
}
